data.name: Dark Waters: Gino and the Witch of the Black Swamp
data.detailed_description:
ABOUT THIS GAME


"Dark Waters: Gino and the Witch of the Black Swamp" is a horror visual novel set in a murky swamp, on the outskirts of an abandoned ghost town. You spend three (?) days in the company of a witch who promises to prove the existence of magic to you, and are ultimately tasked with a choice that will seal your fate.

THE STORY


You are Gino Castallo, a young man tortured by his own mundane existence. Your off hours are occupied reading books about urban legends and going on expeditions to the sites of alleged hauntings. There has to be more to life than... this, right?

However, you always seem to end up empty-handed, and today is no different. But this time you stumble upon a swamp during the long trek home from yet another pointless journey. A woman who claims to be some kind of benevolent witch offers to show you her magic.

This is the proof you've been waiting for... isn't it?

data.short_description: A short and sweet visual novel about a man who goes looking for the paranormal and discovers some lewd (but horrifying) discoveries.
data.reviews:
“While a few things could be better, you can't pass this one if you're in the mood for a short and spooky VN”
Verdict: Very Good – Lewd Games Reviewers

“In my opinion, the writing is incredible.”
Good – FuwaNovel

“A short but impressive, mostly-linear text-based horror novel. The protagonist mysterious witch is nice. The anime artwork is great and lewd, worth checking.”
Good – HornyHentaiFestival

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP
  • 處理器: 400 MHz
  • 顯示卡: Onboard Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound Compatible
